body_preview:
Thanks for your interest in Chime! Our team will review your submission and we'll get back to you with an update soon.

While we learn more about you, we suggest learning a bit more about us here:  

Learn what life is like at Chime on our blog.
Our values are really important to us—here’s what they are and why they matter.
We’re member-obsessed and strive to connect with our members on a human level. See what they have to say and how we stay connected with them on our Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram.
We’re growing! Learn about our teams in Chicago and San Francisco on our LinkedIn page.

💚, 

Chime Talent
